name: S-13 (SS-118)
events: 5 Jun 1943 USS S-13 departed Coco Solo, Panama Canal Zone for Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.
10 Jun 1943 USS S-13 arrived at Guantanamo Bay, Cuba from Coco Solo, Panama Canal Zone.
17 Aug 1943 USS S-13 departed Guantanamo Bay, Cuba for Coco Solo, Panama Canal Zone.
3 Jan 1945 USS S-13 departed the Panama Canal Zone for Key West, Florida.
10 Jan 1945 USS S-13 arrived at Key West, Florida.
11 Jan 1945 USS S-13 departed Key West, Florida for New London, Connecticut.
19 Jan 1945 USS S-13 arrived at New London, Connecticut.
8 Mar 1945 USS S-13 departed New London, Connecticut for the Philadelphia Navy Yard.
9 Mar 1945 USS S-13 arrived at the Philadelphia Navy Yard.
